mapper.sql: publication_id, event_id, event_type, event_version, listener_id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, payload, status, publication_date, completion_attempts, last_resubmission_date, completion_date, last_error, next_retry_at, revision
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO event_publication (publication_id, event_id, event_type, event_version, listener_id, aggregate_type, aggregate_id, payload, status, publication_date, completion_attempts, last_resubmission_date, completion_date, last_error, next_retry_at, created_at, revision) VALUES (#{publicationId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{eventId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{eventType}, #{version}, #{listenerId}, #{aggregateType}, #{aggregateId, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}, #{payload, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{status, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.StringEnumTypeHandler}, #{publicationDate, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{completionAttempts}, #{lastResubmissionDate, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{completionDate, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, #{lastError}, #{nextRetryAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler},
#{publicationDate, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)
, #{revision})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM event_publication WHERE status IN ('PUBLISHED', 'RETRY_PENDING') AND (next_retry_at IS NULL OR next_retry_at <= #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}) ORDER BY publication_date ASC, publication_id ASC LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
mapper.update: UPDATE event_publication SET status = 'COMPLETED', completion_date = #{completedAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE publication_id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status IN ('PUBLISHED', 'RETRY_PENDING') AND revision = #{expectedRevision}

UPDATE event_publication SET status = 'RETRY_PENDING', completion_attempts = completion_attempts + 1, last_error = #{lastError}, last_resubmission_date = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, revision = revision + 1 WHERE publication_id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status IN ('PUBLISHED', 'RETRY_PENDING') AND revision = #{expectedRevision}

UPDATE event_publication SET status = 'DEAD_LETTERED', last_error = #{finalError}, last_resubmission_date = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, next_retry_at = NULL, revision = revision + 1 WHERE publication_id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status IN ('PUBLISHED', 'RETRY_PENDING') AND revision = #{expectedRevision}

UPDATE event_publication SET status = 'RETRY_PENDING', completion_attempts = 0, last_resubmission_date = #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}, next_retry_at = NULL, last_error = CONCAT(IFNULL(last_error, ''), ' | REQUEUED by ', #{operator}, ' at ', #{now, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.InstantTypeHandler}), revision = revision + 1 WHERE publication_id = #{id, typeHandler=com.pdp.persistence.typehandler.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} AND status = 'DEAD_LETTERED' AND revision = #{expectedRevision}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_publication WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT FROM event_publication WHERE status = 'DEAD_LETTERED' ORDER BY last_resubmission_date DESC, publication_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
